text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of disorientation. The tilted angle of the hallway unsettles me, as if gravity itself has shifted. Yet, moving to the colorful R+D space, curiosity slowly replaces confusion. The vibrant patterns and talk of evolution, research, and coexistence with intelligent machines awaken my mind. I feel caught between uncertainty and wonder, reminded of how perspective can shift our entire experience. Physically and philosophically off-balance, I am prompted to question both my environment and the habits of thought I bring to it.
